case_title: ZHOU, SHI XING vs. MENDOZA, ADELA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHOU, SHI XING AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, ADELA DOES 1 TO 4 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-06-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-05-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-17-1996

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-05-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-05-1997, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND OSC TO PLAINTIFF TO SHOW CAUSE AS TO WHY SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED. HEARING SET FOR MAR-07-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-07-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-07-1997, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 3RD OSC AS TO WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED BASED ON PLTF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULED. $50.00 SANTION IMPOSED ON PLTF'S ATTY. HEARING SET FOR APR-07-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-06-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JAN-06-1997, OSC IS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR 1/6/97 AND FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. HEARING SET FOR FEB-05-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF APR-07-1997, DISMISSAL FOR PLTF'S FAILURE TO APPEAR AT 3RD OSC. DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO CCP 575.2 AND CASE OF CA CASUALTY VS MENDOZA (1995) 36 CA 4TH 678.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF
